title: Worker HTTP endpoint returns the expected status family and response content
description: Checks that an HTTP endpoint on the selected worker returns the expected status prefix and contains a required response fragment.
command: tmp=$(mktemp); trap 'rm -f "$tmp"' EXIT; code=$(curl -sS -o "$tmp" -w "%{http_code}" --max-time {{timeoutSeconds}} -X {{method}} {{curlArgs}} "{{url}}" || true); case "$code" in {{expectedStatusPrefix}}*) grep -F -- "{{mustContain}}" "$tmp" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; *) echo "$code"; cat "$tmp"; exit 1 ;; esac
